response.justification: Candidate is a strong, versatile senior/staff full-stack engineer with ~14 years of experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) at re:cinq. However, the role targets a Director-level Principal IC with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms at scale, and engineering leadership influence with strategic customers — none of which are evidenced. No AI/ML research background, no advanced degree, no track record of shaping cloud/AI strategy or advising external stakeholders. Profile reads as senior individual contributor, not principal-level AI strategist.
strengths: Broad full-stack range across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput microservices (millions of req/s at Dunnhumby)
Recent hands-on AI-agent tooling work (MCP generators, agentic frameworks) at re:cinq
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev, open-source platform founder (GISCollective)
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized expertise at the scale a Principal AI Strategy role requires
Lacks engineering leadership / strategy footprint — no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud product direction
Experience tenure (~14 yrs) and seniority titles fall short of Director-level Principal IC scope; no advanced AI degree

key_factors.factor: Recent AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP, agentic tooling)
